🎭 UIL OAP Contest Setup Generator

Fill in information as it becomes available across all tiers, then click Generate to download a ZIP of your contest documents. Check off only the documents you need before generating.

Year-over-year reuse▼

Save the current form as a named snapshot to reload next year. Use Export/Import to move snapshots between computers or browsers.

📅 Contest Details

After Planning Meeting▼
Dates & Times
Competition Format
Critique Format
Rehearsals
Day 2 gets the rest
10 min transition added between each slot
Fees & Deadlines
Leave blank if no entry fee
Leave blank if no admission
Auto-set to 10 days before contest
Date of the advancing BiDistrict contest
Speechwire Access
Per-contest credentials — saved with this contest's snapshot and regenerate backup.

⚖️ Adjudicators

After Contracting▼
Mailing addresses are shared with directors for script submission. Include full address with city and ZIP.

🏫 Schools & Directors

Enter As Known▼
Enter school names and director contact info as soon as you know who is participating. Set Number of Schools in Tier 2 first. Play titles are entered in the next section after the entry deadline.

🎭 Play Titles & Performance Order

After Entry Deadline▼
Enter after the UIL Spring Meet entry deadline. Performance order should match the blind draw.

📦 Documents to Generate

Select All That Apply▼

📧 All-Director Email List (copy & paste into Gmail)

✉️ Email Draft Composer

▼

Click a template to pre-fill a draft using your contest details. Edit in the boxes, then copy.

Select the schools that are advancing. The email will go only to their directors.

📋 Contest Day Schedule Preview

▼

Updates live as you fill in First Show Time, # of Schools, and Critique Format.

Enter a First Show / Setup Time to see schedule preview.

🎲 Critique Assignment Randomizer

CM Eyes Only▼
Randomly assigns critiques to judges based on number of schools and judges. Judge 1 receives fewer assignments when not evenly divisible. When "After Each Show" is selected, Judge 1 will never be assigned the last school. This assignment is for Contest Manager use only — it is not included in any generated documents.
